.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(228, 228, 228) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.canvas-node-container .markdown-rendere.background: linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px, color(srgb 0.54032 0.3608 0.9592 / 0.15) 1px, color(srgb 0.54032 0.3608 0.9592 / 0.15) 2px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 3px) repeat scroll 0% 0% / 64px 64px padding-box border-box, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 61px, color(srgb 0.54032 0.3608 0.9592 / 0.15) 62px, color(srgb 0.54032 0.3608 0.9592 / 0.15) 63px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 64px) repeat scroll 0% 0% / 64px 64px padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: color(srgb 0.450267 0.300667 0.799333 / 0.6) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.metadata-property-key.font-family: "??", "??", "JetBrains Mono", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.metadata-property-value.font-family: "??", "??", "JetBrains Mono", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.status-bar.background: rgb(197, 197, 197) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(228, 228, 228) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, rgb(228, 228, 228) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(rgb(228, 228, 228), color-mix(in srgb, rgb(228, 228, 228) 65%, transparent))
body.--file-header-font: '??', '??', 'JetBrains Mono', monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
body.--font-interface: '??', '??', 'JetBrains Mono', monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
body.--metadata-input-font: '??', '??', 'JetBrains Mono', monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
body.--metadata-label-font: '??', '??', 'JetBrains Mono', monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, rgb(228, 228, 228) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(rgb(228, 228, 228), color-mix(in srgb, rgb(228, 228, 228) 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(228, 228, 228) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
body.font-family: "??", "??", "JetBrains Mono", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(228, 228, 228) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
body.styled-scrollbars.font-family: "??", "??", "JetBrains Mono", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

div.callout-title.background: color(srgb 0 0 0 / 0.05) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-clickable.mod-collapsible.nav-fol.background: color(srgb 0.54032 0.3608 0.9592 / 0.3) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
color(srgb 0.54032 0.3608 0.9592 / 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-clickable.mod-collapsible.tree-it.background: color(srgb 0.54032 0.3608 0.9592 / 0.3) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(228, 228, 228) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(197, 197, 197) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(197, 197, 197) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(228, 228, 228) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(197, 197, 197) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(138, 92, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(228, 228, 228) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"text\"].font-family: "??", "??", "JetBrains Mono", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

kbd.background: color(srgb 0.54032 0.3608 0.9592 / 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: color(srgb 0.54032 0.3608 0.9592 / 0.3) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: color(srgb 0.54032 0.3608 0.9592 / 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: color(srgb 0.54032 0.3608 0.9592 / 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr.background: color(srgb 0.54032 0.3608 0.9592 / 0.181818) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: color(srgb 0.54032 0.3608 0.9592 / 0.181818) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: color(srgb 0.54032 0.3608 0.9592 / 0.181818) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: color(srgb 0.54032 0.3608 0.9592 / 0.181818) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
